LanguageData.RB_Ship_Beam_Glass.description: The outer structural elements of a ship's hull. Does not include conduits for power or coolant.
LanguageData.RB_Ship_Beam_Glass.label: ship hull (glass)
LanguageData.RB_Ship_Beam_Viewport.description: The outer structural elements of a ship's hull. Does not include conduits for power or coolant.
LanguageData.RB_Ship_Beam_Viewport.label: ship hull (viewport)
